name: termcanvas
description: An infinite canvas desktop app for visually managing terminals

scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/pty-launch.test.ts tests/pty-manager.test.ts tests/window-events.test.ts tests/diff-card-expansion.test.ts tests/session-watcher.test.ts tests/process-detector.test.ts tests/preferences-store.test.ts tests/terminal-registry.test.ts tests/scrollback-snapshot.test.ts tests/scrollback-buffer.test.ts tests/theme-contrast.test.ts tests/terminal-theme-state.test.ts tests/terminal-input-focus.test.ts tests/terminal-content-focus.test.ts tests/terminal-cursor-blink.test.ts tests/tile-focus-guard.test.ts tests/cli-launchers.test.ts tests/cli-registration.test.ts tests/insights-engine.test.ts tests/usage-collector.test.ts tests/usage-heatmap-layout.test.ts tests/canvas-viewport.test.ts tests/terminal-state.test.ts tests/terminal-focus-scheduler.test.ts tests/terminal-focus-regression.test.ts tests/terminal-key-handling.test.ts tests/terminal-adapters.test.ts tests/terminal-session-bootstrap.test.ts tests/composer-submit.test.ts tests/composer-input-behavior.test.ts tests/composer-store.test.ts tests/composer-targeting.test.ts tests/slash-commands.test.ts tests/shortcut-behavior.test.ts tests/git-diff.test.ts tests/card-layout-store.test.ts tests/hover-card-visibility.test.ts tests/project-store-sync-worktrees.test.ts tests/project-store-focus.test.ts tests/theme-palette.test.ts tests/terminal-replay-history.test.ts tests/updater-store.test.ts tests/close-flow.test.ts tests/zoom-to-terminal.test.ts
